title: Mega Man 2
platform_style_description: NES aesthetic, limited palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and strong silhouette readability
main_subject: a small blue armored android with a rounded arm blaster
environment: a night city rooftop stage with simple industrial towers and one moonlit skyline line
action_mood_cue: standing ready before advancing into a robot-threatened city
composition: single blue android only, one rooftop path, one skyline line, crisp NES readability, and no crowd
memory_hook: robot-master stage energy, rooftop action-platforming, and immediate hero-vs-machines readability
legal_watchouts: avoid exact Mega Man face and helmet design
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small blue armored android with a rounded arm blaster in a night city rooftop stage with simple industrial towers and one moonlit skyline line, standing ready before advancing into a robot-threatened city.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- NES aesthetic, limited palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and strong silhouette readability
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- heroic, arcade, mechanical

Composition:
- single blue android only, one rooftop path, one skyline line, crisp NES readability, and no crowd
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid exact Mega Man face and helmet design, avoid official enemy silhouettes, avoid exact blaster shape, avoid franchise logos, avoid resemblance to mega man

generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
